project.component: { "keyToString": { "ASKED_MARK_IGNORED_FILES_AS_EXCLUDED": "true", "ASKED_SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "Notification.DisplayName-DoNotAsk-Black action on save file ignored": "Black action on save file ignored", "Notification.DoNotAsk-Black action on save file ignored": "true", "Python.app.executor": "Run", "Python.auto_map.executor": "Run", "Python.auto_mapping.executor": "Run", "Python.button_holder.executor": "Run", "Python.custom_dialog.executor": "Run", "Python.db.executor": "Run", "Python.digital_clock.executor": "Run", "Python.file_validator.executor": "Run", "Python.find_dialog.executor": "Run", "Python.game.executor": "Run", "Python.highlighter.executor": "Run", "Python.horizontal_layout.executor": "Run", "Python.layout_colorwidget.executor": "Run", "Python.layout_widget.executor": "Run", "Python.main.executor": "Run", "Python.mainWindow.executor": "Run", "Python.main_2.executor": "Run", "Python.menus.executor": "Run", "Python.message.executor": "Run", "Python.mouse_event.executor": "Run", "Python.notepad.executor": "Run", "Python.qcheckbox.executor": "Run", "Python.remove_sharp.executor": "Run", "Python.rockWidget.executor": "Run", "Python.schema.executor": "Run", "Python.sub_menu.executor": "Run", "Python.test.executor": "Run", "Python.todo_app.executor": "Run", "Python.todo_list.executor": "Run", "Python.widgets_.executor": "Run", "Python.widgets_pyside6.executor": "Run", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.TerminalTabsStorage.copyFrom.TerminalArrangementManager.252": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "last_opened_file_path": "E:/Pyside6_Desktop_App", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "actions.on.save" }, "keyToStringList": { "DatabaseDriversLRU": [ "sqlite" ] } }
